name: Monarch Lizamon

signature_move.name: Annihilate Edge
signature_move.description: ChargesRisanautr's blades with plasma energy, and slashes.

description: A Cyborg Digimon remodeled for assault. The giant vernier thruster s mounted on Monarch Lizamon's back have high propulsive power, which enable its enormous body to move quickly. Its left arm is equipped with " Risanautr ", an assault armament with a double-headed axe and a plasma cannon, allowing it to unleash a variety of attacks—thrusts, slashes, and shots. Its " Annihilate Edge ", a slash attack unleashed by charging Risanautr 's blades with plasma energy, inflicts severe damage to the opponent due to it "melting and slicing” them at a super-high temperature. Also, its " Monarch Ordinance ", in which it uses the high propulsive power of its vernier thrusters to rapidly move in on the opponent, pierces them with Risanautr , and then fires its plasma cannon at maximum power at point-blank range, is powerful enough to vaporize an opponent in a single blow, provided they are not that big. The characteristic crescent-shaped horn on its brow is a plasma energy-generating organ, and the plasma energy produced by its crescent horn is used as a propellant for its vernier thrusters or as energy for Risanautr . Its Special Move is tearing the opponent to pieces with a plasma blade generated by charging its crescent horn with plasma energy to its utmost limit ( Final Judgment ). This slash attack, in which it performs a huge jump with its vernier thrusters, followed by a high-speed vertical spin in midair using the thrust of its verniers, and then a ramming attack that adds the energy of its descent, is truly its "deadly" greatest move.
